subcodes.first_line: Whosoever manifesteth from himself traces of malice and base desire, verily, he is remote from the Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر نفسی از او اثار خباثت و شهوت ظاهر شود او از حق
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @chastity and purity, @idle fancies; lust and passion
